source_title: 03 Game Mode/03 Making Your First Game

evidences.content: 现在，我想绘制一些蓝图，制作出一个非常简单的游戏，这样你就能清楚地 Now I want to make some blueprints and build out a really simple game so that you have a clear 了解虚幻将如何用于游戏。就像我们之前说的那样 understanding of how Unreal would be used for games. And just like we were talking about before, 这就是发送和接收、设置和获取一个对象到另一个对象的数据。 this is all about sending and receiving, setting and getting data from one object to another. 这就是我们要在下一个示例中设置的全部内容。假设我们要启动 That's all we're going to be setting up in this next example. So let's say we want to start 收集这些绿色红宝石和绿钻石。让我们收集五颗这样的钻石，然后 collecting these green rubies, these green diamonds. So let's collect five of these and 我们会记分。我们会在角落里弹出一个小窗口，让大家知道我们收集了多少。 we'll keep score. We'll have a little pop-up in the corner so that we know how many we've collected. 一旦我们收集到五颗钻石 我们就能把跳跃变成超级跳跃这样 And then once we collect five of these diamonds, we'll turn our jump into a super jump. And that'll 让我们跳到这个盒子上面，因为通常我们要跳到一个盒子上，再跳到 let us jump on top of this box here, because normally we'd have to jump onto one box and onto 另一个只是为了站起来。但我们的场景中有这样一个对象，当我撞到它时，我们可以看到 another just to get up. But we have this object in our scene and when I run into it, we can see 物理功能已启用。但我们想要的是，我们穿过它，然后它 physics are enabled. But we're going to want something that we walk through it and then it 消失，然后在角落里弹出一个分数计数器。那么，我们如何才能设置类似 disappears and then we get a score counter popping up in the corner. So how can we set something like 那是什么？我要把这个添加到第三人称蓝图文件夹中。所以我要 that up? So I'm going to add this right into the third person blueprint folder. So I'm going to 创建一个新蓝图，我将其命名为 BP 下划线 gem pickup。然后打开这个 create a new blueprint and I'm going to call it BP underscore gem pickup. And let's open up this 蓝图，并创建这些绿钻。所以我要创建一个新组件 blueprint and we're going to create these green diamonds. So I'm going to create a new component 在这个蓝图中。我要搜索静态网格，你可以看到这里有这个选项。 in this blueprint. I'm going to search for static mesh and you can see we have that option here. 我将调用这个 gem，并在右侧搜索场景中的静态网格。 I'll call this gem and on the right side, I'm going to search for a static mesh in my scene. 我要搜索钻石，你会看到这个控制装备钻石。让我点击 I'm just going to search for diamond and you'll see this control rig diamond. And now let me press save and I'm going to drag and drop this blueprint into our scene 并将其从地面抬起。但现在这只是一个漂浮在空中的静态网格。 and lift it off the ground. But right now all this is is a static mesh floating in the air. 因此，如果我按下播放键并碰到它，它就会阻止我们前进。所以我们要 So if I press play and I ran into it, it would just block us from moving forward. So we want to 跑过这个，收集它，一旦我们跑过它，它就会消失，然后给我们一点分数。 run through this, collect it, have it disappear once we run through it and give us a little score. 那么我们该怎么做呢？首先，我们要设置碰撞检测。所以 So how can we do that? Well, the first thing we'll want to set up is the collision detection. And now 当我跑过同一区域时，碰撞就完全消失了。所以我们没有办法 when I run through that same area, that collision is now completely gone. So there's no way for us 不再重叠。太酷了这样就差不多了。现在，这个打印字符串节点真的 to overlap with it anymore.
